title: Ecological Selection of Anammox Bacteria Driven by Endogenous Carbon in a Low-Oxygen SBR Biofilm System Without External Carbon Addition
description: SpeakForWater Episode 20: Ecological Selection of Anammox Bacteria Driven by Endogenous Carbon in a Low-Oxygen SBR Biofilm System Without External Carbon Addition. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
